overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a 1960s American suburban neighborhood. The character draws a weapon briefly while crossing the street, passes a pedestrian, and waits at an intersection for traffic to clear. The scene features vintage cars, brick residential buildings, and lush summer vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with brick wall and vintage parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the residential sidewalk next to a tall brick wall with agave plants

entered.detail: tall brown brick wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
large spiky green plants growing along the base of the brick wall
two-story brick residential house with white trim and scaffolding on the roof
classic 1960s white sedan parked along the curb
black ornate street lamp post on the sidewalk
black metal public trash can on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by a tall brick wall with lush agave plants on the right and vintage parked cars on the left. The scene features 1960s suburban architecture with mature trees providing dappled shade.

events.description: character draws a pistol and aims forward while crossing the street
character holsters the weapon and continues walking across the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road while drawing and aiming a pistol, then holstering it and continuing to the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
gray asphalt street surface with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the residential street, briefly drawing and aiming a handgun before holstering it. The brick wall and plants of the previous sidewalk are left behind as the character moves toward the opposite side of the street with parked vintage cars visible.

events.description: character passes a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward an intersection, passing a woman walking the opposite way

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking in the opposite direction, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: red and silver fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
red octagonal stop sign at the approaching intersection
classic 1960s green sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk approaching an intersection, passing a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. A stop sign and fire hydrant become visible at the corner, while vintage cars drive by on the street.

events.description: character stops at the intersection corner to wait for vintage cars to pass through
character resumes walking past a phone booth along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner for traffic to clear, then continuing along the sidewalk past a phone booth

notable_agents.action: vintage black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: classic red and white phone booth on the sidewalk
larger multi-story building visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the street corner to allow several vintage cars to pass through the intersection. After the traffic clears, the character continues walking past a classic phone booth and wooden bench, with commercial buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit 1960s suburban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential stretch to a busier street intersection. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a tall brick wall and lush agave plants, moving under the dappled shade of mature trees. As the character crosses the street, the brick wall recedes and they briefly draw and holster a handgun before reaching the opposite sidewalk. The scene then opens up as the character passes a female pedestrian and approaches a street corner marked by a stop sign and fire hydrant. Finally, the camera pauses as the character waits for a stream of vintage cars to clear the intersection before continuing past a classic phone booth and wooden bench toward distant commercial buildings.
